name: small insurance brokers processing 5–15 claims/month tool
description: For small insurance brokers processing 5–15 claims/month, the complexity of filing causes delays in claim approvals. We streamline the filing process instead of relying on manual filing processes and third-party services.
problem_solved: Complexity and time consumption in filing workers' compensation claims.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Complexity and time consumption in filing workers' compensation claims.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For small insurance brokers processing 5–15 claims/month, the complexity of filing causes delays in claim approvals. We streamline the filing process instead of relying on manual filing processes and third-party services.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual filing processes and third-party services

one_liner: For small insurance brokers processing 5–15 claims/month, the complexity of filing causes delays in claim approvals. We streamline the filing process instead of relying on manual filing processes and third-party services.
